hero.title: Shaybaarka Hal-abuurka
hero.description: Sahamin demos is-dhexgal ah, tijaabooyin, iyo bandhigyo farsamo oo ka socda kooxdeena injineerinka.

hero.title: Shaybaarka Hal-abuurka
hero.description: Waxaan sahaminaa xuduudaha wax ku oolka ah ee AI, otomaatiga, iyo nidaamyada la qaybiyey, kadibna waxaan u beddelnaa cilmi-baarista la xaqiijiyay awoodo wax-soo-saar oo lagu kalsoonaan karo.

researchAreas.title: Goobaha Cilmi-baarista
researchAreas.description: Aag kasta oo diiradda la saaro wuxuu isku xiraa cilmi-baaris sahamin ah iyo waddooyinka hirgelinta ee loogu talagalay nidaamyada dhabta ah.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Faahfaahin Kooban oo Diiradda Saaran
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Mashaariicda cilmi-baarista ee muddada dhow ayaa hadda ka guuraya xaqiijinta dhismaha ilaa qorshayaasha gaarsiinta.

fromLabToProduction.title: Laga bilaabo Shaybaarka ilaa Soo Saarista
fromLabToProduction.description: Hal-abuurka Horizon waxaa lagu cabbiraa natiijooyinka la soo diray, ma aha tijaabooyin gooni ah.

roadmap.title: Khariidadda R&D
roadmap.description: Horumar heer sare ah oo ka bilaabma dhisidda awoodda ilaa nidaamyo la qabsan karo oo si joogto ah u hagaajinaya.

publications.title: Daabacaadaha & Aragtiyo
publications.description: Qoraallo farsamo iyo hirgelin laga helay shaqada hal-abuurka ee socota.

appliedAi.title: Nidaamyada AI ee la adeegsado
appliedAi.description: Qaab-dhismeedyo AI oo diiradda saaraya wax-soo-saarka oo ka kooban adeegga moodooyinka, habeynta astaamaha, iyo tijaabooyinka la maamulo.

automationFrameworks.title: Qaab-dhismeedyada Otomaatiga
automationFrameworks.description: Qalabka otomaatiga gudaha ee badbaadada hawlgalka, jawaabta dhacdooyinka, iyo hababka injineernimada ee la soo celin karo.

advancedArchitecture.title: Tijaabooyinka Qaab-dhismeedka Sare
advancedArchitecture.description: Cilmi-baaris ku saabsan qaab-dhismeedyo adkaysi leh oo qaybsan oo loo habeeyay waxqabadka, dulqaadka ciladka, iyo miisaanka.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Sirdoonka ayaa ku jira geeska go'aaminta dib-u-dhaca hooseeya, habaynta telemetry-ga, iyo isku-duwidda qalabka.

nlp.title: Habka Luqadda Dabiiciga ah
nlp.description: Hababka fahamka luqado badan ee nidaamyada kala soocidda, soo saarista, turjumaadda, iyo wada hadalka.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Algorithms-ka Isbeddelka & Hagaajinta
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Nidaamyada raadinta iyo hagaajinta oo dhiirrigeliyay xulashada dabiiciga ah si loo xalliyo caqabadaha injineernimada cabbirka sare.

automationFrameworks.title: Qaab-dhismeedyada Otomaatiga
automationFrameworks.description: Waxaan dhiseynaa qaab-dhismeedyo hab-socod oo la isku dari karo oo loogu talagalay habaynta sii deynta (release orchestration), albaabada tayada, iyo xaqiijinta post-deploy si loo yareeyo khilaafka gacanta isla markaana la kordhiyo kalsoonida.

advancedArchitecture.title: Tijaabooyinka Qaab-dhismeedka Sare
advancedArchitecture.description: Tijaabooyinkayaga qaab-dhismeedka waxay diiradda saaraan xeeladaha kala qaybinta adeegyada, qaababka adkeysiga gobollada, iyo xakamaynta waxqabadka ee nidaamyada ka shaqeeya baahida kacsan.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Waxaan xaqiijineynaa naqshadaha event-streaming iyo edge inference designs oo suurtageliya go'aanno maxalli ah oo degdeg ah iyadoo la ilaalinayo xakamaynta dhexe, kormeerka, iyo maamulka wareegga moodelka.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Qorsheynta Awoodda La Qabsiga
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Prototypes-ka shaybaarka waxaa lagu xaqiijiyaa culeysyada la dayactiray kadibna waxaa lagu dhex daray istiraatiijiyadaha madal autoscaling ah.

operationalIntelligence.title: Sirdoonka Hawlgalka
operationalIntelligence.description: Pipelines NLP waxay ka guuraan tijaabooyinka la xakameeyo una gudbaan hab-socodka taageerada wax-soo-saarka si loo helo triage degdeg ah iyo aragti cad.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Hagaajinta Nidaamyada Bixinta
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Hababka isbeddelka ee lagu tijaabiyo shaybaarka ayaa loo beddelaa matoorada hagaajinta ee jadwalka iyo qaybinta.

edgeDecisioning.title: Go'aanka Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: Tijaabooyinka IoT iyo edge inference waxaa loo adkeeyay adeegyo low latency ah oo leh xaddidaad kalsooni adag.

now.title: Aasaaska AI ee La Adeegsaday
now.description: Ballaari templates-ka adeegga moodeelka ee dib loo isticmaali karo, xirmooyinka qiimeynta, iyo heerarka la socodka ee kooxaha alaabta.

next.title: Hababka Injineerinka Madax-bannaan
next.description: Ka hawlgeli qaab-dhismeedyada otomaatiga ah ee yareeya khatarta deployment-ka iyo gaabinta wareegyada feedback-ka ee rarista.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Sirdoonka Edge-Native
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Kordhi qaab-dhismeedka isku dhafan ee cloud-edge si loo helo inference ku dhow waqtiga-dhabta ah deegaanada xasaasiga ah ee latency-ga.

longHorizon.title: Nidaamyada Hagaajinta Joogtada ah
longHorizon.description: Midee tijaabooyinka, kormeerka, iyo hagaajinta si nidaamyadu si ammaan ah ula qabsan karaan xaaladaha isbeddelaya.

aiReliability.title: Injineernimada Nidaamyada AI ee Sii Aaminaya Inta Lagu Jiro Soo Saarista
aiReliability.summary: Aragti wax ku ool ah oo ku saabsan isku dheelitirka xawaaraha tijaabada iyo maamulka wax soo saarka.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Qaababka Qaab-dhismeedka Qaybsan ee Madalaha Kobaca Sare
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Qoraallada goobta ee tijaabooyinka dhismaha waxay diiradda saareen waxqabadka, adkaysiga, iyo fudaydka hawlgalka.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Khariidaynta R&D ee Natiijooyinka Ganacsiga
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Sida aan u dhisno hindisaha hal-abuurka si helitaanku uga gudbaan tijaabada ilaa qiimaha la cabbiri karo.

cta.title: Dhis Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Nala shaqee si aan u xaqiijino fikradaha waaweyn si dhaqso ah loona wareejiyo fikradaha la xaqiijiyay nidaamyo wax-soo-saar oo ammaan ah oo la ballaarin karo.

hero.title: Nidaamyada AI ee la adeegsado
hero.description: Guudmar wax ku ool ah sida Horizon u naqshadeynto, u hirgeliso, una maamusho nidaamyada barashada mashiinka laga bilaabo prototype ilaa wax-soo-saarka.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Dhuumaha Barashada Mashiinka
machineLearningPipelines.description: Production AI waxay ka bilaabataa pipelines la soo celin karo oo isku xira xogta, tijaabada, xaqiijinta, iyo jawaab celinta.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Qaababka Fidinta Moodooyinka
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Istaraatiijiyadda hawlgalka waxaa lagu doortaa iyadoo lagu saleynayo shuruudaha dib u dhaca, muhiimadda ganacsiga, iyo adkaysiga hawlgalka.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Qaabka Hawlgalka MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Hababka MLOps waxay hubiyaan in nidaamyada AI ay noqdaan kuwo lagu kalsoonaan karo, la maamuli karo, lana miisaan karo marka isticmaalku sii kordho.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Kormeerka iyo Kalsoonida
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observationability waxay xirtaa loop-ka u dhexeeya dhaqanka moodelka iyo natiijooyinka hawlgalka.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Xogta iyo Injineerinka Astaamaha
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Qaadashada xogta nooca la beddelay, hubinta tayada, iyo qeexitaannada astaamaha dib loo isticmaali karo waxay abuuraan saldhig lagu kalsoonaan karo oo loogu talagalay tababarka moodeelka.

modelDevelopment.title: Horumarinta Moodeelka
modelDevelopment.description: Tijaabooyinka waxaa la raacaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo qaabab la soo celin karo, cabbirro bartilmaameed, iyo saldhigyo isbarbardhig otomaatig ah.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Xaqiijinta iyo Albaabada Badbaadada
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Tusaalooyinka musharixiinta waxay maraan hubinta waxqabadka, adkeysiga, iyo siyaasadda ka hor inta aan la oggolaan in la sii daayo.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Wareegyada Jawaab-celinta Hawlgalka
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Telemetry-ga kadib hawlgalka wuxuu ogeysiiyaa mudnaanta dib-u-tababarka, go'aannada dib-u-celinta, iyo qorsheynta soo socota.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Adeegyada Saadaalinta Waqtiga-dhabta ah
realTimeInferenceServices.description: API-yada slow-latency ee codsiyada is-dhexgalka leh oo leh autoscaling, caching, iyo observation level-level.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Saadaasha Kooxaha iyo Qulqulka
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Dhuumaha jadwalka leh iyo kuwa dhacdooyinka ku saleysan ee loogu talagalay dhibcaha mugga badan ee falanqaynta iyo habraacyada hawlgalka.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Hawlgelinta Edge-Aware
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Qaababka adeegga daruurta edge ee isku dhafan ee deegaanada u baahan inference maxalliga ah iyo maamulka moodeelka dhexe.

ciCdForModels.title: CI/CD ee Moodooyinka
ciCdForModels.description: Hababka otomaatiga ah ee dhisidda, tijaabiya, iyo sii deynta ayaa yareeya khatarta hawlgelinta iyadoo la ilaalinayo xawaaraha gaarsiinta.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Diiwaanka Moodeelka iyo Wareegga Nolosha
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Qalabka moodeelka ee la beddelay oo leh marxaladaha dhiirrigelinta, asalka iyo habraacyada ansixinta ayaa kor u qaada xakamaynta iyo raadraaca.

servingInfrastructure.title: Adeegga Kaabayaasha
servingInfrastructure.description: Lakabyada adeegga ee la miisaan karo oo leh xeelado rollout sida canary iyo shadow deployments waxay taageeraan maareynta isbeddelka ammaan ah.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Dib u dhac, awood, iyo raadraaca waxtarka kharashka
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Digniinaha dib-u-celinta tayada xogta iyo hababka hagaajinta
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Kormeerka ee u hoggaansanaanta iyo falanqaynta dhacdooyinka

cta.title: Cabbirka AI-ga La Adeegsado Si Kalsooni leh
cta.description: Haddii aad qorsheyneyso mashaariicda AI ee u baahan natiijooyin la cabbiri karo iyo dayactir waqti dheer, Horizon waxay ka caawin kartaa naqshadeynta iyo hawlgalka wareegga nolosha nidaamka oo dhan.
cta.secondary: Sahmin Shaqo Shaybaar oo Dheeraad Ah

hero.title: NLP-ga Luqado Badan
hero.description: Sahmiyo awoodaha farsamaynta luqadda dabiiciga ah ee wax ku oolka ah iyo sida ay u kordhiyaan nidaamyo wax soo saar oo lagu kalsoonaan karo oo luqado badan leh.

foundations.title: Aasaaska NLP
foundations.description: Farsamaynta luqadda dabiiciga ah waxay isku darsataa calaamadaha luqadeed iyo barashada mashiinka si ay uga soo saarto macnaha, ujeeddada, iyo qaab-dhismeedka qoraalka.

workbench.title: Is-dhexgalka NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Isticmaal demo-ga si aad u tijaabiso ogaanshaha luqadda, qiimeynta dareenka, soo saarista entity-ga, iyo dhaqanka turjumaadda waqtiga dhabta ah.

productionApplications.title: Sida Horizon U Dabaqo NLP ee Soo Saarista
productionApplications.description: Awoodaha NLP waxaa lagu dhex daray hab-socodka ganacsiga iyadoo la adeegsanayo ilaalinta waxqabadka iyo cabbirrada tayada cad.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Kalsoonida iyo Mabaadi'da Maamulka
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Wax-soo-saarka NLP wuxuu u baahan yahay wax ka badan tayada moodeelka; Waxay ku tiirsan tahay hababka badbaadada ee soo bandhigista iyo xaqiijinta joogtada ah.

foundations.intro1: Nidaamyada casriga ah ee NLP waxay taageeraan otomaatiga, xiriirka raadinta, soo saarista aqoonta, iyo iskaashiga luqado badan. Hirgelinta wax ku ool ah waxay u baahan tahay tayada moodeelka iyo xakameyn hawlgal oo xooggan.
foundations.intro2: Horizon, waxaan diiradda saarnaa nidaamyada NLP ee dhammaadka ilaa dhammaadka oo isku dara aragti adag, la daawado, maamul, iyo saameyn wax soo saar la cabbiri karo.

languageDetection.title: Ogaanshaha Luqadda
languageDetection.description: Waxay aqoonsataa luqadda laga bilaabo qaybaha qoraalka gaaban ama dheer si loo mariyo codsiyada nidaamka habka ee saxda ah.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Falanqaynta Dareenka
sentimentAnalysis.description: Waxay soo saartaa ujeeddo dareen iyo kala duwanaansho loogu talagalay sirdoonka macaamiisha, triage-ka taageerada, iyo wareegyada jawaab-celinta alaabta.

entityExtraction.title: Soo saarista Entity
entityExtraction.description: Waxay ogaataa walxo la dhisay sida magacyada, shirkadaha, goobaha, iyo taariikhaha laga helo qoraal aan nidaamsanayn.

translation.title: Tarjumaad
translation.description: Waxay taageertaa hab-socodka luqado badan iyadoo la turjumayo qoraalka ay soo saarto ama hawlgalka iyadoo la haynayo macnaha.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Taageerada iyo Sirdoonka Tigidhada
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Kala saar codsiyada soo galaya iyadoo loo eegayo degdegga, ujeeddada, iyo dareenka si loo dedejiyo tayada marin-biyoodka iyo jawaabta.

governedContentOperations.title: Hawlaha Mawduuca ee La Xakameeyo
governedContentOperations.description: Ku dabaq shaandhadyada luqadda ee siyaasadda iyo hubinta dhexdhexaadnimada iyadoo la isticmaalayo saxnaan la cabbiri karo iyo bartilmaameedyo xasuus ah.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Fahamka Ganacsiga ee ku saleysan qoraalka
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Isku ururi isbeddellada dukumentiyada, dib-u-eegista, iyo isgaarsiinta si loo fahmo go'aannada istiraatiijiyadda iyo hawlgalka.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Qiimeynta Kiiska Isticmaalka
evaluationByUseCase.description: Moodooyinka waxaa lagu barbar dhigaa xogta domain-ka ka hor inta aan la gaarin go'aannada sii deynta.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Ilaalinta Aadanaha ee Wareegga
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Saadaasha saameynta sare leh waxaa ka mid ah waddooyinka dib-u-eegista, xeerarka kor u qaadista, iyo calaamado kalsooni oo hufan.

continuousMonitoring.title: Kormeerka Joogtada ah
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift-ka, latency-ga, iyo hoos u dhaca tayada ayaa si joogto ah loo socdaa si joogto ah sidaas darteed dib-u-tababarka iyo dib u celinta waa mid firfircoon.

hero.title: Qiyaasta Algorithm-ka Hidde-sideyaasha
hero.description: Sahamin xisaabinta isbeddelka ee deegaan is-dhexgal ah oo arag sida mabaadi'daas isku mid ah loogu beddelo nidaamyada hagaajinta wax-soo-saarka.

scientificFoundation.title: Aasaaska Sayniska
scientificFoundation.description: Algorithms-ka hidde-sideyaasha waa hababka hagaajinta ee ku saleysan tirada dadka, kuwaas oo dhiirrigeliyay xulashada dabiiciga ah iyo la qabsashada.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Deegaanka Isbeddelka Is-dhexgalka
interactiveEnvironment.description: Orod simulation-ka si aad u aragto horumarka jiilka jiilka jiilka iyo sida cadaadiska xulashada uu u saameeyo natiijooyinka.

productionUse.title: Sida Horizon U Isticmaasho Tan Soo Saarista
productionUse.description: Isla farsamooyinka raadinta ee lagu isticmaalay demo-gan ayaa faahfaahinaya pipeline-yada hagaajinta ee lagu rakibo nidaamyada hawlgalka.

applicationDomains.title: Goobaha Codsiga Ballaaran
applicationDomains.description: Hagaajinta isbeddelka ayaa si gaar ah qiimo leh nidaamyada leh ujeeddooyin firfircoon iyo xaddidaadaha is khilaafsan.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Taa beddelkeeda, halkii hal xal la raadin lahaa, algorithms-ka hidde-sideyaasha waxay horumariyaan bulsho kala duwan oo musharrixiin ah. Jiil kasta waxaa lagu qiimeeyaa iyadoo la eegayo function fitness function waxaana la hagaajiyaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo doorasho, is-dhexgal, iyo isbeddel.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Tani waxay ka dhigaysaa kuwo waxtar leh dhibaatooyinka cabbirka sare leh ee leh xaddidaadaha aan tooska ahayn, halkaas oo hababka deterministic-ka ay noqdaan kuwo jilicsan ama xisaab ahaan qaali ah.

selection.title: Xulashada
selection.description: Musharaxiinta waxqabadka sare leh ayaa u badan inay badbaadaan oo saameyn ku yeeshaan jiilka xiga.

crossover.title: Isku-dhafka
crossover.description: Sifooyinka xooggan ayaa dib loo isku darayaa si loo abuuro xalal cusub oo musharax ah oo leh awoodo isku dhafan.

mutation.title: Isbeddelka
mutation.description: Randomness-ka la xakameeyo wuxuu keenaa kala duwanaansho si raadinta aysan u istaagin agagaarka maxalliga ah.

convergence.title: Isku-darka
convergence.description: Jiilal badan, dadka ayaa u janjeera xalal deggan oo tayo sare leh.

resourceScheduling.title: Jadwalka Kheyraadka
resourceScheduling.description: Waxaan isticmaalnaa xeeladaha isbeddelka si aan u hagaajino jadwalka xaddidaadaha badan halka raadinta xoogga badan aysan suurtagal ahayn.

architectureTuning.title: Habaynta Dhismaha
architectureTuning.description: Qaabeynta kaabayaasha musharixiinta ayaa si isdaba joog ah loo qiimeeyaa si loo hagaajiyo waxqabadka iyo waxtarka kharashka.

continuousOptimization.title: Hagaajinta Joogtada ah
continuousOptimization.description: Shaqooyinka hagaajinta waxay ku socdaan wareegyo xakameysan oo leh jawaab celin telemetry, si nidaamyadu ula qabsadaan marka astaamaha baahida ay is beddesho.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Qorsheynta Waddada iyo Saadka
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Qorsheynta gaarsiinta adag iyo dirista waxay ka faa'iidaystaan raadinta isbeddelka marka xaddidaadaha si degdeg ah isu beddelaan.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Raadinta moodelka iyo hyperparameter
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Raadinta hidde-sideyaasha waxay heli kartaa qaabeynta moodeelka tayo sare leh marka dusha bartilmaameedka ay buuq badan yihiin oo aan toos ahayn.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Dhibaatooyinka Kaydka iyo Qaybinta
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Hagaajinta hoos yimaada yoolalka tartamaya waxaa lagu tilmaami karaa is-weydaarsi caafimaad oo u dhexeeya kooxaha musharixiinta ee isbeddelaya.
